description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single `build` stage, a global rule that excludes scheduled pipelines, and the runner tag `gitlab-org` for all jobs. Define the following jobs, each using its specified Docker image and executing the exact shell commands listed: AsciiDoc-classic-Python2 (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/python2`) runs `apt-get update`, `DEBIAN_FRONTEND="noninteractive" apt-get install -y python2-dev asciidoc-base`, and `python2 ./waf configure --enable-warnings --enable-Werror --enable-doc --enable-manpage build --disable-nts --pyshebang "/usr/bin/env python3"`; AsciiDoc-classic3-Debian-Old (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/debian-oldstable`) runs `apt-get update`, `DEBIAN_FRONTEND="noninteractive" apt-get install -y python3-dev asciidoc-base`, and `python3 ./waf configure --enable-warnings --enable-Werror --enable-doc --enable-manpage build --disable-nts --pyshebang "/usr/bin/env python3"`; AsciiDoc-no (image `alpine`) runs `apk update && apk add gcc bison musl-dev openssl-dev libcap-dev python3-dev pythonispython3` and `python ./waf configure --enable-warnings --enable-Werror --disable-doc --disable-manpage build`; AsciiDoc-py3-Alpine (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/alpine`) runs `apk update && apk add python3-dev asciidoc` and `python3 ./waf configure --enable-warnings --enable-Werror --enable-doc --enable-manpage build`; alpine-basic (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/alpine`) runs `echo /usr/local/lib/python3.12/site-packages > /usr/lib/python3.12/site-packages/ntpsec.pth`, `python3 ./waf configure --enable-warnings --enable-Werror --disable-doc --disable-manpage build --pyshebang "/usr/bin/env python3"`, `python3 ./waf install`, and `python3 ./waf uninstall`; alpine-edge-basic (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/alpine-edge`) runs the same commands as alpine-basic and is allowed to fail; alpine-edge-refclocks (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/alpine-edge`) runs `python3 ./waf configure --enable-warnings --enable-Werror --disable-doc --disable-manpage --refclock=all build` and may fail; alpine-refclocks (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/alpine`) runs the same refclock command; centos-latest-basic (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/centos-latest`) runs `python3 ./waf configure --enable-warnings --enable-Werror --disable-doc --disable-manpage build --pyshebang "/usr/bin/env python3"`, `python3 ./waf install`, `python3 ./waf uninstall`; centos-latest-refclocks runs the same with `--refclock=all`; clang-basic (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/clang`) runs `echo /usr/local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/ > /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/ntpsec.pth`, `python3 ./waf configure --enable-warnings --enable-Werror --disable-doc --disable-manpage --check-c-compiler=clang build --pyshebang "/usr/bin/env python3"`, `python3 ./waf install`, `python3 ./waf uninstall`; clang-refclocks runs the same with `--refclock=all`; coverity-scan (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/coverity`) runs a curl download of the Coverity analysis package, extracts it, configures waf with `--refclock=all`, runs `cov-analysis-linux64-*/bin/cov-build --dir cov-int python3 ./waf build`, archives the results, and uploads them via curl using `$COVERITY_TOKEN`; cross-armhf-build (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/cross-armhf`) determines the Python version, then runs two waf configure/build commands for cross‑compilation with `--cross-compiler=arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc` and different `--enable-pylib` options; debian-oldstable-basic (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/debian-oldstable`) runs `echo /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/ > /usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/ntpsec.pth`, waf configure/build with `--disable-nts`, install and uninstall; debian-oldstable-refclocks runs the same with `--refclock=all`; debian-stable-basic (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/debian-stable`) runs similar commands using Python 3.13 paths; debian-stable-mDNS-basic (image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/debian-stable-mdns`) runs waf configure/build; debian-stable-mDNS-refclocks adds `--refclock=all`; debian-stable-refclocks runs on the regular stable image with `--refclock=all`; debian-testing-basic and debian-testing-refclocks follow the same pattern on the testing image; debian-unstable-basic and debian-unstable-refclocks are allowed to fail and follow the same pattern on the unstable image; feature-attic, feature-classic-mode, feature-debug, feature-debug-timing, feature-disable-debug-gdb, feature-disable-droproot, feature-early-droproot, feature-leap-smear, and feature-mssntp (all using image `$CI_REGISTRY/ntpsec/ntpsec/alpine`) each run a single waf configure command with the respective `--enable-` or `--disable-` flags and `--refclock=all` where applicable, all in the build stage.
